items.caption: A single tatuaje mexican experiment me ii cigar against a plain white background. the cigar is positioned vertically and is adorned with a band featuring a red, white, and green color scheme, which is characteristic of the mexican flag. the band has text that reads "tatuaje mexican experiment me ii," indicating the brand and model of the cigar. the cigar itself appears to be a robusto size, with a dark brown color and a smooth, shiny surface. the overall style of the image is a clear, straightforward product photograph with a focus on the cigar, intended to showcase its design and branding.
